channel.title: bibtex on Cillian Berragan
channel.description: Recent content in bibtex on Cillian Berragan

item.title: Managing References in R Markdown and Rnoweb
item.description: When writing my dissertation I found it difficult to dynamically manage references to R packages that I had used along the way. For the main document refernces I use Zotero which makes managing these trivial, but for packages, it wasn’t quite a simple.
